nasb.text: Then Hezekiah had said, “What is the sign that I shall go up to the house of the Lord?”

esv.text: Hezekiah also had said, “What is the sign that I shall go up to the house of the Lord?”

cnv.text: 希西家問：“我能上耶和華的殿去，有甚麼兆頭呢？”

ccb.text: 希西迦问：“有什么兆头能证明我可以再上耶和华的殿吗？”

csbs.text: 希西加却问：“有什么征兆来证明我会上耶和华的殿呢？”
